results.query: What are the core operational hours defined in the Attendance Policy?
results.reference: The core operational hours are 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST.
results.response: The core operational hours defined in the Attendance Policy are from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST (Indian Standard Time) (Doc: Attendance_Policy.md).

To establish clear guidelines regarding punctuality, daily attendance tracking, core working hours, and the management of unscheduled absences. This document serves as a foundational pillar of governance within AI_OOPS Pvt. Ltd., ensuring that all operational milestones are met with the highest standard of professionalism, corporate discipline, and ethical execution. In an era of rapid technological advancement and changing market demands, having a clear and well-defined framework is crucial. This document

1. daily check-in: Tap biometric card at the security gate or log into the VPN and check-in on the HR Portal.
2. core-hour compliance: Be present or online during core hours (10:00 AM - 4:00 PM).
3. late arrivals: Notify the manager if arriving after 10:30 AM. Accumulating more than 3 late arrivals in a month triggers warning.
4. tracking corrections: Submit attendance regularization requests within 48 hours in the portal for missed taps.

results.query: Can I book my own flights for corporate travel?
results.reference: No, all bookings must be processed by the BIA travel desk to avail of corporate discount rates.
results.response: No, you cannot book your own flights for corporate travel. All bookings must be processed by the respective travel desk (e.g., bia travel desk, AI_OOPS travel desk, NovaTech travel desk, or Darshan_AI_Engineer_Ops travel desk) to avail of corporate discount rates (Doc: Travel_Policy.md).
retrieved_contexts:
## Frequently Asked Questions
Below are answers to common questions regarding the interpretation and application of this policy:

Q: Can I book my own flights?
A: No, all bookings must be processed by the bia travel desk to avail of corporate discount rates.

Q: What happens if I lose a receipt?
A: For expenses under INR 500, a written declaration is accepted. Above that, missing receipts require department head approval.

results.reference: Earned leaves can be encashed only at the time of separation from the company, up to a maximum of 45 days.
results.response: Yes, you can encash your earned leaves, but only at the time of separation from the company, and up to a maximum of 45 days (Doc: Leave_Policy.md).
retrieved_contexts:
## Frequently Asked Questions
Below are answers to common questions regarding the interpretation and application of this policy:

Q: Can I encash my leaves?
A: Earned leaves can be encashed only at the time of separation from the company, up to a maximum of 45 days.

Q: What happens if I take leave without approval?
A: Unauthorized absences are treated as loss of pay (LOP) and may lead to disciplinary action.

results.query: What is BIA's hybrid remote work model?
results.reference: BIA operates on a hybrid model consisting of 3 days in-office and 2 days remote.
results.response: BIA operates on a hybrid work model where employees are expected to work 3 days in-office and 2 days remotely. Remote work eligibility is determined by the department head and HR. (Source: Employee_Handbook.md)
retrieved_contexts:
## Frequently Asked Questions
Below are answers to common questions regarding the interpretation and application of this policy:

Q: Can I work fully remote?
A: Remote work eligibility is determined by the department head and HR. bia operates on a hybrid model (3 days in-office, 2 days remote).

Q: How do I request a duplicate ID card?
A: Submit an IT service ticket under the 'Facilities' category.

results.reference: Employees on hybrid/remote setups can claim internet reimbursement up to INR 1,500 monthly by uploading the service bill.
results.response: Yes, employees on hybrid/remote setups can claim internet reimbursement up to INR 1,500 monthly by uploading the service bill. (Doc: Expense_Reimbursement.md)
retrieved_contexts:
## Frequently Asked Questions
Below are answers to common questions regarding the interpretation and application of this policy:

Q: Can I claim broadband expenses?
A: Yes, employees on hybrid/remote setups can claim internet reimbursement up to INR 1,500 monthly by uploading the service bill.

Q: Is there a limit on client lunch expenses?
A: Yes, client meals are capped at INR 1,500 per person. Exceptions require pre-approval from the department head.
